svg.text: AI-Driven Methodology Pipeline for Cardiovascular Disease Detection
Technical Implementation: Multi-Modal Cardiac MRI → Feature Extraction → Fusion → Dual-Head Prediction → Validated Clinical Output
Abu Sufian — Chang'an University · Department of AI & Medical Imaging · UCL PhD Proposal 2025–2026
𝒳 = { X_T1, X_T2, X_LGE, X_cine, X_clinical }
• Multi-modal cardiac MRI (T1, T2, LGE, Cine) from 1.5T/3T
• Structured clinical metadata: age, sex, BMI, comorbidities
• Inclusion/exclusion criteria · Ethics approval · QC flags
• Bias field correction · z-score intensity standardisation
• Rigid + deformable registration across cardiac phases
• Slice harmonisation · voxel resampling to 1.25 mm isotropic
h = [ h_cnn ‖ h_vit ‖ h_rad ‖ h_mot ] ∈ ℝ^(d1+d2+d3+d4)
• ResNet-50 CNN: local myocardial texture + fibrosis patterns
• ViT-B/16: global long-range cardiac structural relationships
• 107 radiomic features: GLCM, GLRLM, first-order statistics
• LSTM/GRU: temporal cine MRI functional dynamics
z = 𝒱( h_T1, h_T2, h_LGE, h_cine, h_clin )
z ∈ ℝ^d — shared cardiac representation space
• Modality-specific encoders projected to shared dimension
• Cross-modal attention: Q, K, V from different modalities
• Layer normalisation + residual connections per modality
• Joint optimisation of all encoder branches end-to-end
latent embedding z flows to predictive modelling
ℒ = λ1 · ℒ_cls(ŷ_cls, y) + λ2 · ℒ_risk(ŷ_risk, y_risk)
• Multi-task joint training with balanced weighted loss
• Class weighting for imbalanced myocardial abnormalities
• Early stopping · LR scheduling · gradient clipping
• SHAP values: feature importance for clinical inputs
• Grad-CAM: pixel-wise saliency overlaid on MRI
• Attention weights → tissue region biomarker discovery
• Interpretable imaging biomarkers beyond black-box AI
• Spatial maps aligned with myocardial anatomy
AUC · F1 · Sensitivity · Specificity · Calibration Error (ECE)
• McNemar test · DeLong AUC comparison · bootstrapping
• Sensitivity analysis by age, sex, scanner, imaging site
• Net Reclassification Index (NRI) for clinical utility
• Comparison vs. Framingham / established risk scores
• HF risk prediction with 95% confidence intervals
• Streamlit web dashboard for clinical integration
NOVELTY AND ORIGINAL CONTRIBUTION — What is Methodologically New in This Research
Joint T1, T2, LGE, Cine MRI +
No prior work uses all 4 modalities.
and HF risk score from one model.
Stage: 8 | Flow: Left-to-Right | UCL PhD Proposal
Notation: 𝒳 = input data · z = shared latent embedding · ŷ = model output · ℒ = joint loss · ℳ = myocardial mask · θ, φ = learnable parameters · ℝ^d = d-dim real vector space
Technical Methodology Pipeline · AI-Driven Cardiovascular Disease Detection · Abu Sufian · Chang'an University
© 2025–2026 Research in Progress · Multi-Modal Cardiac MRI Analysis · Explainable AI · Clinical Translation
